commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# ============================================================================
# PRODUCTION-FOCUSED .gitignore - StudentVC Application
# Only essential application code should be committed
# ============================================================================

# ============================================================================
# PYTHON & FLASK APPLICATION
# ============================================================================
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class
*.so
.Python
build/
develop-eggs/
dist/
downloads/
eggs/
.eggs/
lib/
lib64/
parts/
sdist/
var/
wheels/
pip-wheel-metadata/
share/python-wheels/
*.egg-info/
.installed.cfg
*.egg
MANIFEST

# ============================================================================
# VIRTUAL ENVIRONMENTS - IGNORE ALL
# ============================================================================
venv/
venv*/
test_env/
venv_main/
env/
ENV/
env.bak/
venv.bak/
.venv/
.env/

# ============================================================================
# DEVELOPMENT & TESTING FILES - IGNORE ALL
# ============================================================================

# Test files (all patterns)
test_*.py
*_test.py
debug_*.py
fix_*.py
clean_*.py
analyze_*.py
simulate_*.py
emergency_*.py
manage_*.py
run_*.py

# Test data and logs
test_*.txt
*_test.txt
clean_*.txt
debug_*.txt
*logs*.txt
server*.txt
root_test.txt
clean_3_test.txt

# Pytest
.pytest_cache/
.coverage
htmlcov/
.tox/
.cache

# ============================================================================
# DATABASE & INSTANCE FILES
# ============================================================================
*.db
*.sqlite
*.sqlite3
*.db-journal

# Database exports and backups
*.sql
*export*.sql
*backup*.sql
instance/backups/
instance/logs/
instance/temp/
instance/*.db
instance/*.sqlite*
backend/instance/backups/
backend/instance/*.sql
backend/instance_backup_*/

# Flask instance cache
.webassets-cache

# ============================================================================
# SECURITY & CERTIFICATES
# ============================================================================
*.pem
*.key
*.cert
*.crt
*.p12
*.pfx
bbs_private.pem
bbs_public.pem
private.pem
public.pem

# Environment variables and secrets
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local
.envrc
config/local.*
secrets.*
deployment.env

# Configuration overrides
local_settings.py
local_config.json
development_config.json
selective_disclosure_settings.json
settings_default.json

# ============================================================================
# COMPILED LIBRARIES & BINARIES
# ============================================================================
*.dylib
*.dll
*.so
libbbs_core.dylib

# ============================================================================
# LOG FILES - IGNORE ALL
# ============================================================================
*.log
logs/
server*.log
debug*.log
service.log
*_logs_*.txt
*_debug_*.txt

# Log files with timestamps
*_20[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]_*.log
*_20[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]_*.txt

# ============================================================================
# TEMPORARY FILES & REPORTS - IGNORE ALL
# ============================================================================

# HTML/JSON reports
*.html
*_vcstatus.html
*_vcstatus_check.html
*_test.html
*_report.html
tub_*.html
fub_*.html
root_*.html

# JSON data files
*.jsonl
*INTEGRATION_TEST_REPORT.json
*TEST_RESULTS.json
*NGROK*.json
# ============================================================================
# DOCUMENTATION SPAM - IGNORE TEMPORARY DOCS
# ============================================================================

# Fix/Report documentation (temporary)
*FIX*.md
*SUMMARY*.md
*REPORT*.md
*DOCUMENTATION*.md
*GUIDE*.md
*STRATEGY*.md
*ENHANCEMENTS*.md
*RESTORATION*.md
*DEPLOYMENT*.md
*RESULTS*.md
*STATUS*.md
*COMPLETE*.md

# Development documentation patterns
CLAUDE*.md
HERZCHIRURG*.md
PERFECT_*.md
TENANT_*.md
KEY_MANAGEMENT*.md
NETWORK_*.md
SELECTIVE_*.md
SWAGGER_*.md
NGROK_*.md
BBS_*.md
ALPINE_*.md
DATABASE_*.md
SETTINGS_*.md

# Backup documentation
*backup*.md
*_backup_*.md
final_*.md
herzchirurg_*.md

# ============================================================================
# BACKUP FILES - IGNORE ALL
# ============================================================================
*.bak
*backup*
*_backup_*
*_bak
*.backup

# Timestamped backups
*_20[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]_*
*backup_20[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]_*

# Template backups
*.html.bak
*.html.backup
*.js.bak
*.css.bak

# ============================================================================
# ARCHIVES & CLEANUP - IGNORE ALL CONTENT
# ============================================================================

# Archive directories (ignore all content)
archives/
archives/**

# Cleanup artifacts
*cleanup*
*migration*

# ============================================================================
# TEMPORARY & CACHE FILES
# ============================================================================
tmp/
temp/
.tmp/
*.tmp
*.temp
*~
.cache/
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
.directory

# IDE and editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*.sublime-*
.vimrc.local

# ============================================================================
# CURSOR AI & VS CODE
# ============================================================================
.cursor/
.lh/
.lhignore

# ============================================================================
# NODE.JS & FRONTEND
# ============================================================================
node_modules/
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
lerna-debug.log*
package-lock.json
yarn.lock

# Frontend build artifacts
dist/
build/
.nuxt/
.next/
.vuepress/dist/
.serverless/

# ============================================================================
# RUST BUILD ARTIFACTS (BBS Core)
# ============================================================================
target/
Cargo.lock
**/*.rs.bk

# ============================================================================
# iOS BUILD ARTIFACTS
# ============================================================================
*.xcuserdata/
*.xcworkspace/xcuserdata/
DerivedData/
*.hmap
*.ipa
*.dSYM.zip
*.dSYM
*.app
build/

# CocoaPods
Pods/
Podfile.lock

# ============================================================================
# JUPYTER NOTEBOOKS
# ============================================================================
.ipynb_checkpoints/
*.ipynb

# ============================================================================
# DOCKER & DEPLOYMENT
# ============================================================================
.dockerignore.backup
docker-compose.override.yml

# ============================================================================
# MISC DEVELOPMENT FILES
# ============================================================================

# Script files (utilities)
setup_*.sh
fix_*.sh
clean_*.sh
*.sh.backup

# CSV exports and data files
exports/
*.csv
data_*.json

# Coverage reports
coverage/
.nyc_output/
.coverage

# Documentation generators
.sphinx/
docs/_build/
site/

# OS generated files
.fseventsd
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db

# ============================================================================
# ALLOW ESSENTIAL FILES (Explicit allows for clarity)
# ============================================================================

# Core documentation (keep these)
!README.md
!CONTRIBUTING.md
!SECURITY.md
!LICENSE
!docs/README.md
!docs/api/README.md
!docs/development/README.md

# Essential configuration
!Makefile
!docker-compose.yml
!requirements.txt
!Dockerfile
!env.example

# Ensure these directories are included (structure only)
!backend/
!frontend/
!mobile/
!docs/
!scripts/
!config/
